RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0004 Page 1 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 580-619 5.53% 7.82% 4.49% 8.24% 10.93% 620-659 7.08% 9.71% 6.05% 10.14% 3.91% 660-699 13.07% 11.97% 5.64% 8.42% 10.13%
